_comment_top: MCP server config for Claude Code. Loaded at session start. See docs/mcp-stack.md for the WHY of each server, MCP-SETUP.md for one-time install steps (PATH addition + GITHUB_PAT env var). Restart Claude Code after editing this file.

serena._comment: Code intelligence (Rust via rust-analyzer, Python via pyright). Prefer over Grep for symbol queries. Exact tool names: mcp__serena__find_symbol, find_referencing_symbols, get_symbols_overview, find_implementations, find_declaration. Requires the user-local Scripts dir on PATH; see MCP-SETUP.md.

github._comment: Official hosted GitHub MCP — no local install. PAT auth via Authorization header. Method-multiplexed tools: mcp__github__issue_read (method=get|get_comments|...), pull_request_read (method=get|get_diff|...), search_issues, list_issues, get_file_contents. Read-only by default per X-MCP-Readonly header; flip to false if you need writes (issue_write, etc.). Replace __PROJECT_OWNER__/__PROJECT_NAME__ with the actual GitHub owner and repo name for this project.
